descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 4-3 in overtime in Centennial Cup playoff game.
descriptionLong: Tony Bobbitt scored at 1:04 of overtime to give the Richmond Sockeyes a 4-3 win over the Humboldt Broncos in a Centennial Cup junior-A playoff game. The victory gave Richmond a 2-1 lead in the best-of-seven Tier 2 western final series. Dave Tomlinson, Mike Claringbull, and Rob Clarke also scored for the Sockeyes, who were outshot 39-23 but rallied from a 2-1 deficit after two periods.

attribution.headline: Bobbitt's overtime goal gives Sockeyes Centennial Cup playoff win
